title: Peacefully Peace
lyrics: Oh, it's the thing you do Oh, oh, oh, hey Peacefully, peacefully I said, I said, I said, I said Peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, keep the fuck away from me I said, peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, I said, I said, I said Peacefully, peacefully, hey I said, peacefully, keep the fuck away from me Ooh, waves fallin' all around Silence, silence, silence, silence Meditate your way, hey And when the hate come, when the hate come, be like Peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, I said, I said, I said Peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, I said, I said, I said Peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, I said, stay the fuck away from me Peacefully, peacefully, please, please, please, dark Don't stay here no more, I said, I said, dark All I want to is ignore that, oh, oh In your soul, oh, it shows so, yeah Peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, I said, I said, I said Peacefully, peacefully, yeah I said, get the fuck away from me Get the fuck away from my ideas Get the fuck away from where I can't hide And I can't have kids I can't go by the bar and get my shot at the latest You made it now, so, hey Peacefully, I don't want to hear about it anymore No, oh, no, oh, oh, no way Now it's gone, hey, but Peacefully, peacefully, I said, I said, I said, I said Peacefully, peacefully, I said, I said, now get the fuck out Get the fuck out the way, get the fuck out my good day Don't bring your bad day here, get the fuck out my good day, hey Peacefully, hey Second verse, you know, it gets harder to show Your indenture and your rottenness, no way to grow So, try to understand that There's still time for you to do that and be that Don't think you're stuck in a wizard or a mind Don't think you're stuck in a wizard or a mind There's a little bit of gray here and there Your light touches everyone you look, don't stare It'll be fine, I promise But if it's not, I'm gonna peacefully have to tell you, you know Get the fuck out of the way, hey I said, I said, I said, I said I said, I said, now get the fuck away from me And me, and me What I meant for you and me in history This is a splatter of time, this is excitement There's no reason to run Peacefully, get the fuck, get the fuck out the way Yeah, get the fuck out the way Peacefully, I breathe self-love It's for me, not for you I promise there'll be a time It's just not right now I'm sorry, but peacefully, peacefully I said, I said, now get the fuck out my way Not today, man Or tomorrow I'm your main fan, but you're all hollow Not today, no tomorrow Peacefully, get the fuck out of my way
